headline: Hey team! This Friday, we hosted a tennis tournament in our Warsaw office in Pol...

title: From #general
headline: Hi everyone ! Remote folks — did you know Appodeal Pulse is available online? In...
quote: Hi everyone ! Remote folks — did you know Appodeal Pulse is available online? In our offices, we run a live company news feed on the TVs — birthdays, team wins, shoutouts from <#C084KUM8W79>, interesting reads, and everything happening across Appodeal. You check it out any time: https://appodeal-pul
author: Liliya Garifullina
